news.title: Iran says Hormuz closed again after Israel strikes Lebanon
news.description: Iran said it was once again closing the vital Strait of Hormuz shipping lane on June 20 over Israel's attacks in Lebanon, calling them a violation of its deal with the United States to end the Middle East war.
